sourceLabel: Lexicon IELTS and Spoken English Institute fees and payment

entries.title: IELTS regular fee range
entries.content: For the imagined Lexicon sample setup, regular IELTS weekday classroom batches usually fall between INR 18,500 and INR 24,000 depending on batch size, number of mock tests, and writing-feedback coverage. The counsellor usually confirms the exact payable fee only after checking whether the learner needs Academic or General Training preparation.

entries.title: IELTS fast-track fee range
entries.content: Fast-track IELTS batches with shorter timelines and denser trainer support are usually around INR 26,000 to INR 34,000 for the cycle. These intensive batches are meant for learners working against a deadline, but the front desk should still avoid promising a score outcome just because the batch is more expensive.

entries.title: Spoken English fee range
entries.content: Spoken English classroom batches usually range from around INR 12,500 to INR 18,500 depending on the learner level, programme duration, and whether the learner is taking a weekday or weekend format. The team normally maps the learner to beginner, intermediate, or confidence-improvement level before finalising the fee.

entries.title: Installment and refund policy
entries.content: Lexicon may allow a split payment in 2 parts for selected batches, especially when the programme fee is on the higher side. Registration or seat-booking amounts are usually handled separately, and the sample policy does not promise a full refund after multiple sessions have already been attended. Batch transfer requests are reviewed case by case rather than guaranteed automatically.
